description_long: This is a large, modern SUV with a beige exterior and a robust, boxy shape typical of American full-size sport utility vehicles. The vehicle features a prominent chrome grille with a blue oval badge, large rectangular headlights, and a wide front bumper. The side profile reveals four passenger doors, silver roof rails, and large windows, providing ample visibility and a spacious interior. The wheels are multi-spoke alloys, and the SUV has black trim around the windows and lower body for added durability. The rear includes a wide tailgate with a rear window, tail lights that wrap around the sides, and a visible license plate area. The overall design suggests a family-oriented, urban-friendly vehicle with off-road capability and significant cargo space.
description: A beige, full-size SUV with a chrome grille, four doors, large windows, and multi-spoke alloy wheels, designed for urban and family use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chrome grille, blue oval badge, rectangular headlights, and wide front bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, silver roof rails, large windows, and alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide tailgate, rear window, wraparound tail lights, and license plate area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing four doors, roof rails, and alloy wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke alloy wheels with a silver finish
